title: Exclusion; offshore wind
doc_html:
§1179. Exclusion; offshore wind

            Unless incorporated by reference into an agreement, this Chapter shall not apply to offshore wind energy agreements entered into by the state.

            Acts 2023, No. 455, §1, eff. June 28, 2023.
doc_text:
§1179.  Exclusion; offshore wind
Unless incorporated by reference into an agreement, this Chapter shall not apply to
offshore wind energy agreements entered into by the state.
Acts 2023, No. 455, §1, eff. June 28, 2023.
